name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Join us this Thursday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,
Our campaign has been busy!

Our volunteer army is hard at work, knocking on thousands of doors and making thousands of phone calls to tell voters how we're going to flip this district back! And this Thursday at 6:00pm, we'll be hosting our latest free Meet & Greet in Jersey Village.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=2e0e6e5ee8bf4a5e89f21b2b9874442b&_e=Wi7_j-yVMeRmdIgCe0HpVmTf7Y_AVXU2HBBGzT5jlOZpQjuT0atv8HMT4MRTy7vgmqvm5O4xAtWi5P2i4XqjNhNS7DnivZrQlWO7EAL1Um5j2bgGiDm_Iqsg4-b_CPrzgiPetjx52slDcN5ag9xIctW0NZuWrEP_bObP48ZU5G-zG6ng2ud9hlMweS2LF2lV8wO5Y-B6pSM8-biXd2TWbngsKbFoZZ8jvU4L3SPxIK6OQI1WATxDljXNWVa9MWcN4Tu-_1EaR7KFmCgq0gnrnXuGnyY-fNHfCls3T7oz5be-LiFCm_E7HBdGNz0Hbwef)

If we're going to beat Lizzie Fletcher in 2020, we need to work hard NOW!

So I hope you can come on out, enjoy some free food and beverages and hear all about our plan to take back the 7th District.

[To RSVP, just click here!](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=2e0e6e5ee8bf4a5e89f21b2b9874442b&_e=Wi7_j-yVMeRmdIgCe0HpVmTf7Y_AVXU2HBBGzT5jlOZpQjuT0atv8HMT4MRTy7vgmqvm5O4xAtWi5P2i4XqjNhNS7DnivZrQlWO7EAL1Um7KDKh7m_F61Vk8W-qMStMsNy9ptlz_KqImkUPI77jVgt1M4XRjt4uiwQ7lgLPypudhkjxtLHSXQd4aGQEDgogHCItirPv35STVQq5fe0O6UmkEo0ZWPC2oH-HDKe8hKZn_L4bvWma08TM9VW0c9zGeHCF7tzwYaHDsMXEchgLdwBzEpe12qW5jSuYzGHGzlWMztN7JPG1C7X_ASDP3wUKD)

Thank you,
Wesley Hunt

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=2e0e6e5ee8bf4a5e89f21b2b9874442b&_e=Wi7_j-yVMeRmdIgCe0HpVt17AjB1iFbLkh_3znLCghkm0_t53uvah8B2A53AxEEBQ5oOL4JfTpTHhxf0Z95SWW83v9dVxatG0lmO-Cxdd6FDFQMhs-kXIKoWk67La4zMbnMEmU6bkac9JPdfDApMhejVpVX9s19em9h0fuDt4HAuRBpVsyFcJQ2a_GSAKmIahsCfXwzrc-TlRwXx8A1YCcO5C3VpmyqlTkiGTYjSUGJYNgShnMu38joFAuUk0LWgmhJYBO_CCN0x1WJ8jetWf1uezbtYT9Yh8eESL74tj38%3D)****

* **First** , Sen. Cornyn voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act **eighteen times**. _Politico_ even dubbed him health care "repeal's top salesman."
* **Then** , Sen. Cornyn helped push hyper-partisan judges like Brett Kavanaugh to lifetime appointments on the Supreme Court.
* **Now** , he's standing by his D.C. bosses and violating his constitutional duty by **" vow[ing] not to pay attention to impeachment."**

**[Pitch in now to help elect MJ Hegar to fight for the _people_ in the Senate, not the D.C. bosses. >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890948/7f51f7bc/4ba62d69/4ef08bea/4287648204/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU4MiIsImUzdGhjMnQ5ZlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191202.1nd__582__&amount=&recurring=true")**
\-- Team MJ

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rob=20Ortt=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Congresswoman Elise Stefanik and President Trump Need Our Help
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR CONGRESS
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
| Dear Friend,

[**Congresswoman Elise Stefanik and I need your help!**](https://gmail.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=ebc9f2baac&e=9f843ba602)

I’m not sure if you saw it, but President Trump was under attack during the sham impeachment proceedings. Then, Congresswoman Elise Stefanik stood up to forcefully and clearly show what a witch-hunt this has all become. Democrats responded the only way they know how, by trying to discredit and silence her. Individuals on the left even went as far as to call her “trash.”

---
|
---
| Congresswoman Stefanik's testimony at the hearings was inspiring for Republicans who have watched radical Democrats and a biased media collude to take down our President while squishy members of the establishment say nothing. It was disappointing to see Democrats react so poorly to a congresswoman’s questions and to resort to labeling a woman they don’t agree with as trash.

As New Yorkers, we’ve had the pleasure of seeing Elise work hard for New York, especially our military and its veterans. Now, she’s established herself as a courageous leader on the national stage.

Because of that and because their bullying didn’t work, the liberal elite is trying to take her out. In Hollywood, San Francisco, and New York City, they’re raising millions to attack her with vicious, misogynistic diatribes.

**[We need to fight back!](https://gmail.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=5755d4c901&e=9f843ba602)**

I’m asking you to [**join me**](https://gmail.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=81d8edb1a4&e=9f843ba602) by making a contribution to help us [**fight back against the radical left.**](https://gmail.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=92676e27cd&e=9f843ba602)

God Bless,
Rob

subject: Cyber Monday & Jeff Bezos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |

| |

| | Friend: As you look through the dozens of "Cyber Monday" deals that have flooded your inbox today I thought it would be a good time to talk about where your money is going. Last year on Cyber Monday, Amazon founder Jeff Bezos made an outrageous $6.28 billion. Meanwhile, new reports have shown that Amazon warehouse workers operate in poor conditions, and receive low wages and pitiful benefits. Amazon supervisors have been caught telling workers to "get back to work" after an employee died of a heart attack on the warehouse floor. [If you agree that something needs to be done, chip in $5 right now and support our campaign powered by highest percentage of grassroots donors. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8f8/3eb3e2fc/682bc281/744d2f64/3885255430/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+If+you+agree+that+something+needs+to+be+&utm_campaign=20191202_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191202_em_fr_b4_castro_all") Right now, there are two billionaires who are spending over $100 million of their personal wealth on their campaigns for the Democratic nomination. **I believe this is a huge departure from what the Democratic party represents.** You can't claim to want to fix our broken economic system and then turn around and use your vast fortune to gain more influence. You can't claim to be fighting against the toxic influence of dark money in our political system and then use your personal wealth to gain access and power. **It is time to say 'enough is enough'. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8f8/3eb3e2fc/682bc281/744d2f6a/3885255430/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=11+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191202_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191202_em_fr_b4_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8f8/3eb3e2fc/682bc281/744d2f69/3885255430/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=20191202_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191202_em_fr_b4_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8f8/3eb3e2fc/682bc281/744d2f68/3885255430/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=20191202_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191202_em_fr_b4_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know "". If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe "", and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Tina Smith
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I know we're coming right off of a holiday weekend and just getting back into the swing of things, so I'll keep this short.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191202-ty?refcode=em191202-ty&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Folks, I know we're coming right off of a holiday weekend and just getting back into the swing of things, so I'll keep this short --

**Thanks to your support, we reached our November fundraising goal. I'm so proud of this incredible grassroots team.**

November is one of the toughest months of the year for political fundraising so it says a lot about the campaign we're building that we were able to rise up to the challenge and hit our target.

**What I'm _most_ proud of is that our average contribution to these messages was just $24.08.**

Your contributions -- no matter how small or large -- power this campaign, and I'm so grateful to know every day that you're with me.

We have many big fights ahead. Our work to save Minnesota's Senate seat and flip the majority will be one of the most consequential tasks of our lifetimes. And we can't forget that our big end-of-year FEC deadline is just around the corner.

So, I'll be in touch soon on how you can support our campaign in the coming weeks, but for now: Thank you, thank you, thank you for everything you have already done.

-- Tina | [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191202-ty?refcode=em191202-ty&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&")
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4051f/c1f7015/669987db/11455a7b/953247885/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
---

PO Box 14362
St. Paul, MN 55114
[Privacy Policy](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4051f/c1f7015/669987db/11455a7c/953247885/VEsC/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://tinaforminnesota.com/privacy.html")

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:

| | |

| Team, Our strategy to get Cory on the December debate stage is to reach as many voters as possible -- and to do that, we need to run ads. In the past few days, we've asked this grassroots team to help us raise enough money to place some ads (because they certainly aren't cheap!) -- and this online community stepped up in a major way. **As a result, we launched brand new digital ads across the country to boost Cory 's poll numbers.** Now, it's time to start running television ads to expand our reach even further. **Will you chip in to help us spread our message?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate-adsfund?refcode=em_fr_20191202_BHQ_20191202-fr-BHQ-ads-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")

As voters and caucus-goers are now making up their minds about who to support, this is the most critical time for them to be hearing about Cory. And here's one thing we know to be true: **The more people hear about Cory, the more they like him.**
Tens of thousands of people have already seen our new digital ads just this weekend. We can reach _so many more_ if we're able to purchase television ads.
**Here 's the thing: Cory isn't a self-funding billionaire, and he doesn't take any money from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or pharma and fossil fuel execs. We can't do this without you. [If you're ready to help us start airing TV ads, chip in here.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate-adsfund?refcode=em_fr_20191202_BHQ_20191202-fr-BHQ-ads-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

Booker HQ

name: Mary Ellen Smith, Team Hick
subject: The Koch network
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
The Koch network has placed a six-figure ad buy in Colorado to support Cory Gardner - officially buying their way into this race. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771427/691c9bd/6fab0065/11a7d6b2/330749176/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team,

Between Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell's efforts, we're already seeing a lot of shady money pour into Colorado on behalf of Cory Gardner, but things just got even more troubling.

The Koch network (yes, those Kochs) have placed a six-figure ad buy to support Gardner and three other embattled Republicans--officially buying their way into this race.

[**_This is a scary development, team --we've seen what they're willing to do and spend to get their way. We need a burst of grassroots support tonight to help fight back._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-dec?refcode=em_fr_20191202_MES_20191202-fr-MES-koch-2mo_2mo_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Make no mistake: The Kochs are buying into this race because they know John will be a threat to their far-right interests in the Senate.

As Governor, John fought tooth and nail to protect wilderness and expand public lands in Colorado, and he made our state a leader in the fight against climate change nationwide.

Cory Gardner, on the other hand, is the first Colorado senator in 50 years not to sponsor a single bill to expand wilderness in Colorado, and he's sided with the Trump administration time and time again to undermine efforts to fight climate change.

This Senate seat does not belong to wealthy special interests in Washington--it belongs to the people of Colorado, and it's up to us to prove it.

**Team, the Senate majority is within our grasp next year, but we need all hands on deck if we 're going to get there.** **Chip in whatever you can right now:** _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through right away._ [**_DONATE $5 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-dec?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_20191202_MES_20191202-fr-MES-koch-2mo_2mo_expresslane5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $10 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-dec?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_20191202_MES_20191202-fr-MES-koch-2mo_2mo_expresslane10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $25 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-dec?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_fr_20191202_MES_20191202-fr-MES-koch-2mo_2mo_expresslane25&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $50 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-dec?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_fr_20191202_MES_20191202-fr-MES-koch-2mo_2mo_expresslane50&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $100 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-dec?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_fr_20191202_MES_20191202-fr-MES-koch-2mo_2mo_expresslane100&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-dec?refcode=em_fr_20191202_MES_20191202-fr-MES-koch-2mo_2mo_expresslaneother&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks,
M.E.

Mary Ellen Smith
Campaign Manager
Hickenlooper for Colorado [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-dec?refcode=em_fr_20191202_MES_20191202-fr-MES-koch-2mo_2mo_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

---

Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771427/691c9bd/6fab0065/11a7d6ab/330749176/VEsHBQ/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771427/691c9bd/6fab0065/11a7d6a8/330749176/VEsHBA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771427/691c9bd/6fab0065/11a7d6a9/330749176/VEsHBw/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771427/691c9bd/6fab0065/11a7d6a6/330749176/VEsHBg/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771427/691c9bd/6fab0065/11a7d6a7/330749176/VEsHAQ/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771427/691c9bd/6fab0065/11a7d6a4/330749176/VEsHAA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). If you'd like to receive only the most important campaign updates, [**_click here_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771427/691c9bd/6fab0065/11a7d6a5/330749176/VEsHAw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/id-like-to-get-less-email?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771427/691c9bd/6fab0065/11a7d6ab/330749176/VEsHAg/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer").

subject: breaking through the noise 📈
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team - we've got great news.

[A new national poll was released that shows Michael is tied with Cory Booker, Julian Castro, and Andrew Yang - all candidates who were on previous debate stages!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba95b/134673f2/9e25b6d/6997bbba/2559350817/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B2_120219_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

While other candidates spent their time playing into the media circus, Michael's been on the ground in the early-voting states, building a true grassroots base of support.

name: Team Kathy
subject: following up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
This would mean so much >>
|
---

| | Today, judges upheld the newly drawn North Carolina congressional districts and confirmed that the primary will take on March 3, 2020--**just 90 days from now!** Since announcing our campaign for the Democratic-leaning Sixth District, Kathy has received an outpouring of enthusiasm and support. Kathy wanted us to let you know that she's so grateful. In 2018, we ran a strong campaign and, despite partisanly gerrymandered districts, we came close to winning. Now, we're running in a newly-drawn Democratic-leaning district and we're in an even stronger position to win in 2020. [_**But time is of the essence and we won 't be able to do it without your help. Add your name and join Team Kathy today. **_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d3df/3d199a51/2f28397c/7364e4b6/2967956087/VEsH/?g= "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e191202_ns") Thanks, Team Kathy \------------- I know, it's been a little while since you last heard from me but I wanted you to be among the first to know. In October, a North Carolina court ruled that our congressional districts are partisanly gerrymandered and they ordered the General Assembly to redraw the congressional district maps for the 2020 elections. New maps were released three weeks ago and the Triad is now located in the newly drawn Sixth District, a Democratic leaning district that includes all of Guilford County and parts of Forsyth County. We fought hard under heavily gerrymandered maps in 2018 because I believed it was important for North Carolinians to have a choice and leaders who will stand up for their interests -- even when the odds are against them. I am proud of the work we did in 2018. Since the new congressional maps were recently announced, I've heard from folks all across the Triad and I'm thankful for the outpouring of support and encouragement to jump back into the race. I'm excited to share --**I 'm running for North Carolina's newly drawn Sixth Congressional District!** North Carolinians continue to need a leader who will put people before politics. They need a representative who will stand up for our values and beliefs. [_**That 's exactly what I'm in this race to do. If you're ready to make Washington work for North Carolina, join our team today.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d3df/3d199a51/2f28397c/7364e4b6/2967956087/VEsE/?g= "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e191202_ns") This fight is deeply personal for me. In 2018, we traveled thousands of miles across North Carolina listening to stories of our neighbors across this community. They want better paying jobs, affordable health care and prescription drugs, and an economy that works for all North Carolinians -- not just those at the top. I'm in this race to expand affordable health care, invest in quality education, and strengthen our economy. And with over 30 years of experience bringing people together to solve tough problems in our community, I believe we can make it happen. [_**Join Team Kathy today >>**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d3df/3d199a51/2f28397c/7364e4b6/2967956087/VEsF/?g= "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e191202_ns") Frankly, this race isn't about me. It's about you. In 2018 -- with your help -- we ran one of the largest Democratic congressional campaigns in North Carolina's history. Our grassroots campaign knocked on thousands of doors, made phone calls, and talked to neighbors from across this community about our shared vision for a better North Carolina. Join us to build on that foundation in 2020. Just like last time, this campaign is going to be driven by hardworking folks who want to see a change in our communities and in our government. [_**So I need to ask: Will you join our team and fight for change in North Carolina?**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d3df/3d199a51/2f28397c/7364e4b6/2967956087/VEsC/?g= "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e191202_ns") Let's do this. With gratitude, Kathy |
---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---

| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d3df/3d199a51/2f28397c/7364e4b7/2967956087/VEsD/?g= "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/unsubscribe/")

name: Senator Mike Braun
subject: I want to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana
body:
[](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jddtltit-kujulhlke-y/)
---
| | Peter, As your Senator, I value the opinions of all Hoosiers and want to represent you here in Washington. **[Take a moment to complete our 2019 Hoosier Voter Survey.](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jddtltit-kujulhlke-j/)** [](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jddtltit-kujulhlke-t/) I have been in office for one year now and have held firm on the promises I made to you during my campaign. Together we have worked to drain the swamp, unshackle businesses from government overregulation and bring more jobs back to the great state of Indiana. [**What issues are critical to you going into next year?**](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jddtltit-kujulhlke-i/) Over the last year, I’ve had the pleasure of hearing from Hoosiers across all 92 counties in Indiana. As I move into my second year, I still want to hear from you about what issues matter to you most. **[Please take a moment to complete this short Indiana voter survey and let us know what topics Hoosiers care most about.](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jddtltit-kujulhlke-d/)** [2019 Indiana Voter Survey](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jddtltit-kujulhlke-h/) My first year in office has been a major success for Hoosier and with your help we can continue to fight for Indiana values in D.C. Thank you, Senator Mike Braun [](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jddtltit-kujulhlke-k/) |

name: Dr. Manny Sethi
subject: Check-Up with Dr. Manny 12/2
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr Manny for U
body:
---
| |
---|---|---
| Happy Monday! I hope you enjoyed your Thanksgiving, and spent some good quality time with your family and friends. I enjoyed this week relaxing and spending time with my family as well as reflecting on the things I am thankful for. After spending some time at home over the weekend, I am excited to get back on the road. I'm looking forward to spending time in all three Grand Divisions yet again this week, heading to West Tennessee to start out, before working my way to Johnson City, and then back in Middle Tennessee for the Robertson County GOP Meeting on Saturday morning. I am thankful for all your support and looking forward to seeing you on the campaign trail. **Media: ** I'm incredibly thankful for this country that I've been fortunate enough to grow up in. I'm grateful for the freedoms that have been given to each and every one of us, and for the men and women who protect those freedoms each and every day. Let's all take a moment to remember those are serving overseas and are unable to be home for the holidays. Follow us on [Facebook](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdkhdkkk-uunkhiuw-y/), [Twitter](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdkhdkkk-uunkhiuw-j/), and [Instagram](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdkhdkkk-uunkhiuw-t/)! Also be sure to tag us on any social media for your chance to be featured in our Check-Up with Dr. Manny. Help me today by signing up or donating through my website, [DrMannyforSenate.com.](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdkhdkkk-uunkhiuw-i/) [As the holidays are upon us, don't forget to grab Christmas gifts, such as our awesome Dr. Manny gear for you or your loved ones! ](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdkhdkkk-uunkhiuw-d/) Looking forward to ending 2019 strong! See you out on the trail. Dr. Manny P.S. We don't have the machine backing us, but we do have you. Would you mind chipping in to our campaign right now to send this conservative outsider to Washington? [Donate](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdkhdkkk-uunkhiuw-h/) |

| My friend, I can't thank you enough for being a part of this team. Because of your support, we were able to power through and reach our November grassroots fundraising goal this weekend. It was a critical turning point for us and you came through, just like you always have. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/BmnEWBeK3-Vn1inLUJrNPtyCZj3wO8GwMnlcenGc5KI=/4cw3RAHktgLzMNq0f9VCeWxzuRM7WO4Ri4pIrghYqUo=?refcode=body&amount=25)

My friend,
I can't thank you enough for being a part of this team.
Because of your support, we were able to power through and reach our November grassroots fundraising goal this weekend. It was a critical turning point for us and you came through, just like you always have.
**Our 2019 fundraising numbers will be made public for the first time shortly after the New Year. All eyes will be on us.** And as long as we keep up our momentum, we're in an incredible position to seize the opportunity and prove that our campaign for One Minnesota is stronger than ever.
Nothing we do is possible without your support. I'm forever grateful for everything you do for our campaign, our state, and our country.
Thanks again,
Tim Walz

N/A,

This past weekend my campaign had a critical fundraising deadline and I was just updated that _we missed our goal_. **[I have extended the deadline but if we don't raise an additional $5,000 before midnight](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53662803:sDMbZrvPN:m:1:2105898951:6CC92A3C97E6E85F1431C3F9913543BD:r)** - it's adiós to my campaign.

I'm not planning on going down without a fight. **[Would you help me crush this November goal, restore Law and Order, and WIN THIS RACE by donating $25, $50, $100 or more before midnight?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53662803:sDMbZrvPN:m:1:2105898951:6CC92A3C97E6E85F1431C3F9913543BD:r)**

[_MIDNIGHT DEADLINE_

Since I announced my campaign to be re-elected Sheriff of Maricopa County the DC Establishment has fought tooth and nail to see me defeated.

They know **_I don't play nice with socialists_** and **_forget about political correctness_** - I tell it like it is.

Because of loyal supporters, like yourself, who know I have stood with President Trump since day one and that my track record speaks for itself - I've been able to stay in this race and combat the Radical Left.

I just need to raise an additional $5,000 before midnight. **[Can I count on you to help me one last time?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53662803:sDMbZrvPN:m:1:2105898951:6CC92A3C97E6E85F1431C3F9913543BD:r)**

Sheriff Joe Arpaio

body:
---
Peter --

Big News: **_we were endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund._**

Groups like Planned Parenthood provide critical care -- especially for folks in our rural communities who are more likely to be uninsured, poor, or forced to drive long distances to get the care they need. Steve King wants to defund Planned Parenthood, cutting access to healthcare for millions of people. As a country, we must expand healthcare coverage and rural accessibility to vital medical services.

**[Will you join Planned Parenthood Action Fund in supporting our campaign to elect J.D. to represent Iowa’s 4th District? Chip in $5 or more today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12485775/128499778/-690034814?refcode=em19_191203_scholtenPP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTYyOTc2OS1lZTE1LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P0QTivJHmFuQvl3wymmMoVT9yypK_70Ftwj9fSnStsA=)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12485776/128499779/-690034814?refcode=em19_191203_scholtenPP&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTYyOTc2OS1lZTE1LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P0QTivJHmFuQvl3wymmMoVT9yypK_70Ftwj9fSnStsA=) | [Express Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12485777/128499780/-690034814?refcode=em19_191203_scholtenPP&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTYyOTc2OS1lZTE1LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P0QTivJHmFuQvl3wymmMoVT9yypK_70Ftwj9fSnStsA=)

[Express Donate $250](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12485780/128499783/-690034814?refcode=em19_191203_scholtenPP&express_lane=true&amount=250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTYyOTc2OS1lZTE1LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P0QTivJHmFuQvl3wymmMoVT9yypK_70Ftwj9fSnStsA=) | [Donate Other Amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12485781/128499784/-690034814?refcode=em19_191203_scholtenPP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTYyOTc2OS1lZTE1LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P0QTivJHmFuQvl3wymmMoVT9yypK_70Ftwj9fSnStsA=)

We’ve heard too many stories from folks in the 4th district about the difficulties of receiving quality, affordable, and accessible care. It underscores just how underserved and overlooked our communities are when it comes to healthcare services.

In Manilla, a woman told us how she received her prenatal care at a Planned Parenthood. We’ve heard from others whose affordable cancer screenings from Planned Parenthood gave them the information they need to battle and beat their diagnoses. In all of Iowa in the past 15 years, 30 OB/GYN units have closed -- making Planned Parenthood even more invaluable to growing our families and ensuring their health, safety, and well-being.

Steve King has gone after Planned Parenthood, blindly towing the party line and working against the needs of this district to cut funding for an organization that performs affordable check-ups, flu shots, and other routine primary and preventative medical treatments.

We are proud to have the support of an organization that provides desperately-needed care to Iowa families.

**[Peter, will you contribute $5 or more today to our campaign to make sure we have a representative who will stand tall with Planned Parenthood?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12485782/128499785/-690034814?refcode=em19_191203_scholtenPP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTYyOTc2OS1lZTE1LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P0QTivJHmFuQvl3wymmMoVT9yypK_70Ftwj9fSnStsA=)**

Standing Tall for All,

\-- Team Scholten

name: Christina Finello
subject: Thanks so much -- and hoping to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finello for Congress
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, I hope you and your family had a wonderful Thanksgiving break. I wanted to reach out to say thanks for all that you do to make my grassroots campaign for Congress possible. I’ve spent a lot of time out in the community meeting with voters, participating in round tables, and connecting with local leaders about the needs of our families in Bucks and Montgomery Counties. Knocking on doors is by far my favorite part of campaigning so far. When I meet voters where they are, I have a valuable opportunity to personally connect with them about their concerns and to share my message. One of my favorite things to talk about at the doors is what qualities they want in their representative in Congress \-- and today, I was wondering how you would respond to that question. So, we put together this survey so we can hear from you! Will you take a moment to let me know your thoughts? Here’s the link: [**https://s.surveyplanet.com/OHOe46Im**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12488075/128519835/1215268575?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjhhMGZiMi1mNDE1LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4FfeMlaiD0xLzXw0BfH1yyW0jX3IwcIJwtzL9Pwxrr8=&emci=4602d66d-2b15-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=f68a0fb2-f415-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=10163004) Thanks,

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: #GivingTuesday: Equip a Christian voter for a little more than the cost of a cup of coffee
body:
| | It’s the day to GIVE for the sake of our nation
---
[ ](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p191203apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191203am_apl01nd&n=1)
| Peter, Happy #GivingTuesday! I know you’re getting a lot of emails today, but I believe one of the most important causes you can donate to is protecting our values for future generations. There are 90-million Christians in America BUT an estimated 25-million will fail to vote in the 2020 elections _unless_ we equip and motivate them. **[Today - #GivingTuesday - you can make a difference. For just $3.20 you can equip one Christian to vote](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p191203apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191203am_apl01nd&n=2).** Christians who fail to vote look a lot like us. These are the people who faithfully attend church but don’t keep up with politics. They volunteer to help others but don’t understand how their vote will also make a difference in the lives of others. It may be the **believer sitting in the pews** every week who doesn’t understand the connection their faith has to voting. It may be the **mom who is busy serving her family** , who forgets to make time to vote. It may be the **young person who volunteers weekly to serve at her church** but doesn’t know what’s on her ballot, who the candidates are, and how the values of her faith should instruct her vote. These Christians believe in God and His principles, love their families and care about our nation - but they don’t see the importance of voting. Or maybe they just don’t know where to start. **You can change this! name: Team Hunt
subject: Commissioner Jack Cagle Endorses Wesley Hunt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Cites Hunt’s Willingness To Stand Up to Radical Left

# **_Commissioner Cagle Endorses Wesley Hunt for Congress_
_Cites Hunt’s Willingness To Stand Up to Radical Left _**

Houston, TX - Today, Commissioner R. Jack Cagle (R, Precinct 4) endorsed Iraq War veteran and native Houstonian Wesley Hunt in the 7th Congressional District. Cagle, one of two Republicans currently sitting on the Harris County Commissioners Court released the following statement.

“As a combat veteran, Wesley has proven himself to be a leader willing to put his own life on the line to protect our freedom and liberty. In his personal life, he’s shown himself to be a conservative willing to stand up against higher taxes and the radical left,” said Cagle. “**I proudly endorse Wesley Hunt in the 7th District because we need leaders like him in Congress.** ”

Last month, Cagle and fellow Hunt endorser Commissioner Steve Radack blocked an attempt by the Democrat controlled Commissioners Court to raise property taxes across Harris County.

“It is an honor to receive the endorsement of Commissioner Cagle. I hope to emulate his service to this district and commitment to conservative leadership,” said Hunt. “Like Commissioner Cagle, I will fight tooth and nail for lower taxes, better schools and to prevent future flooding.”

Cagle joins a slew of conservative leaders, including Senator Ted Cruz and Commissioner Steve Radack in endorsing Hunt.

_Wesley Hunt is a Houston native, West Point graduate and Apache Helicopter pilot running to protect Houston’s values and way of life._

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=65651701a8ef4f95896f499f7b66d50b&_e=Dc47SDsPrhn0S4xfzXu1q-Qn4SDf6CLAYwyp_j5pEw_Q9ZVeznSXVebdNopG1w1aUaaSmA4AY31qbfssd4xk3scjGv8M2oSsqVNu78AD4_FenGzkTESu3NgyP0kieGZqq1HY2I3CajT-weOMj96ldu2YlF-WSuTvmwgr0r7XvhYocjO6GiulIvC_knEEf3ieMVsz6y132RoI3pwTtsU4FrbKbPHneLb0KI-XLFN-0NcU6sFn6i4wmmeHwLlubrGn3Mhxt1eWDiyIXuHY_bSaHkiBq1je4prvhRNWNYFt_J8%3D)****

We're getting closer and closer to 2020 -- in just a few weeks, people will be able to cast their ballot for Elizabeth. **But before that, we have an FEC fundraising deadline**.

This is our last public FEC fundraising report before Iowa. Skeptics will be poring over our fundraising numbers when they are released in January to see if we've been able to continue to grow this movement with only grassroots donations. It's important that we show our strongest report yet.

As an important member of this team, you've helped our campaign get to this point -- thank you. **Now that we're at a critical moment in this race, we have to ask you:**

clean_body: This is our last public FEC fundraising report before Iowa. Skeptics will be poring over our fundraising numbers when they are released in January to see if we've been able to continue to grow... | | | "" We're getting closer and closer to 2020 -- in just a few weeks, people will be able to cast their ballot for Elizabeth. But before that, we have an FEC fundraising deadline. This is our last public FEC fundraising report before Iowa. Skeptics will be poring over our fundraising numbers when they are released in January to see if we've been able to continue to grow this movement with only grassroots donations. It's important that we show our strongest report yet. As an important member of this team, you've helped our campaign get to this point -- thank you. Now that we're at a critical moment in this race, we have to ask you: "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" Thanks for your help, Team Warren "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2019 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Booker HQ
subject: We're going to continue being radically transparent with you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
This is a critical stretch for our campaign. Now is one of those times when we really have to give this everything we've got.
| | |
---
| Team, We're going to continue being radically transparent with you. Our projections are telling us that we'll need to raise $840,406 online this month to keep growing as a campaign. However, we are also only nine days away from the DNC's deadline to qualify for the December debate. That means we have to meet a tough polling threshold to get Cory back on the debate stage in a relatively short period of time. To do that, we'll need to reach as many voters as possible, as quickly as possible. Our best option is to begin running TV ads. If we factor that into our budget, we'll have to raise more than we initially projected. We crunched the numbers and found that if we can bring in an additional $500,000, we'll be able to go up on TV with a sustained ad campaign across multiple media markets. **That 's why we're launching our Get Cory on TV Fund today so we can start reserving TV airtime for our ads. Will you rush a donation right now to help us raise the extra $500,000 we need?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate-adsfund?refcode=em_fr_20191203_BHQ_20191203-fr-BHQ-launchads-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")

We can reach millions of voters and caucus-goers with TV commercials -- far more than through any other means. The challenge for an underdog campaign like ours is that they're just so darn expensive. But with your help and the support of this entire grassroots team, we'll be able to do this.
This is a truly critical stretch for our campaign. Now is one of those times when we really have to give this everything we've got.
**[We know we ask a lot of you, but can you chip in right now so we can start running TV ads?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate-adsfund?refcode=em_fr_20191203_BHQ_20191203-fr-BHQ-launchads-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
Thank you for always stepping up during these critical moments.
Booker HQ
[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate-adsfund?refcode=em_fr_20191203_BHQ_20191203-fr-BHQ-launchads-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d97/5fca0d19/78ac5307/291cbd27/1036465245/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d97/5fca0d19/78ac5307/291cbd26/1036465245/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d97/5fca0d19/78ac5307/291cbd25/1036465245/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d97/5fca0d19/78ac5307/291cbd24/1036465245/VEsHBg/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d97/5fca0d19/78ac5307/291cbed8/1036465245/VEsHAQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

_Your answers will help Team Mondaire understand what issues are most important to Democrats and give valuable insight to our campaign._
* * *
Friend, This campaign is about more than just electing another Democrat to Congress. We’re building a movement made up of everyday people coming together to help elect a progressive champion who understands firsthand the issues working-class families care about most. For too long, our elected leaders have made decisions based on what’s best for their top donors and powerful D.C. special interest groups. This campaign is about a new kind of politics, where people — _not corporate PACs or special interests_ — come first.
**That’s why it’s so important to us that we directly ask our supporters what issues are on their minds.****[Will you take our short survey and share your thoughts so we can create a well-informed, people-first campaign?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/1gA/ni0YAA/t.2x8/z20tegLWSOaRaAoyxtiS5Q/h2/CA0gLXQEKb6jqGkD7RqZiT8OBkXPvclblsAC2tjBY6T12gOCbNLwaojd1FuF-2Fj28GYqvb1csQ0IQycR-2BksI5Bd4WTWbvVNWBUQBi6Y7X07xMRTMAo8i8CCPJCVOV32PKdsK8FbEGHC-2BErpLwtJ-2FfTlBdNYPdoiimwl9bXdbkKX0BnUmpT5n73L4rDkClp0wcuirtzdZd-2B2lUskqMe7JsgTxiu48bswX6rpUBRVywuInWNAjrwbTTTHAoq2nta6XRhGTq9OyK8lwvZ5F5vegfRuGMRCzThGSfX-2BcI3NDfq2SoSw8jFtE7DvRrRt-2By7WhfKo-2BkkE7ITqE2b3kXEtLLhHnABifg2FtYUdyXNMY7ZZg-3D/9Krh) ** | ******SAMPLE QUESTION**

clean_body: Your answers will help Team Mondaire understand what issues are most important to Democrats in your community and give valuable insight to our campaign. | | | Your answers will help Team Mondaire understand what issues are most important to Democrats and give valuable insight to our campaign. Friend, This campaign is about more than just electing another Democrat to Congress. We’re building a movement made up of everyday people coming together to help elect a progressive champion who understands firsthand the issues working-class families care about most. For too long, our elected leaders have made decisions based on what’s best for their top donors and powerful D.C. special interest groups. This campaign is about a new kind of politics, where people — not corporate PACs or special interests — come first. That’s why it’s so important to us that we directly ask our supporters what issues are on their minds.** | ****SAMPLE QUESTION What issues are most important to you this election season? We’ll be reading your answers tomorrow morning. Please turn in your survey response as soon as you can to help us create a new kind of politics informed by real people like you. ******** Team Mondaire | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is: Mondaire for Congress P.O. name: Adam Hattersley
subject: big news!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hattersley for Congress
body:
Hi Peter,

First -- let me express my deepest gratitude to you for helping us meet our November fundraising goal. Our campaign continues to be a people-powered endeavor, and it’s your generosity that’s allowed us to grow and pose a threat to Ross Spano and his blatant corruption.

Second -- I want to loop you in on some exciting news here at Hattersley HQ! Ahead of the new year, we’re throwing our grassroots kick-off event tonight and I’d love for you to join us! [https://www.facebook.com/events/421943465370387/]

We are hoping to make this our biggest fundraising day of the quarter, so even if you can't make it, I hope you'd consider a contribution.
[http://secure.actblue.com/donate/hattersley_q42019?refcode=Em_fr_2019.12.03_b1_AH_all&amount=25.00&recurring=1]

We’re working hard to grow this campaign into the machine it needs to be to take on Spano and his special interest backers -- and with your continued support, I know we can get there.

Thank you for all of your support, Peter!
-Adam

Adam Hattersley is Navy Veteran and local state representative working to flip Florida's 15th Congressional District.
Can we count on you to contribute a few dollars to Adam's campaign? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hattersley_q42019?refcode=Em_fr_2019.12.03_b1_AH_all&amount=25.00&recurring=1]

Adam Hattersley is running to represent Florida's 15th Congressional District. To learn more, please visit hattersleyforcongress.com
Use of Adam's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or the United States Navy.

| | Friend, I just heard some disheartening news. **Tulsi Gabbard just announced that she has hit the 200,000 donor threshold to qualify for the December Debate.** [This is the first time that she has hit this threshold before us. ](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8f9/3eb3e2fc/6831d616/744d2fa3/3568641939/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+This+is+the+first+time+that+she+has+hit+&utm_campaign=20191203_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191203_em_fr_b1_castro_all") At the last debate Tulsi Gabbard didn't help push the discourse in a positive direction. She didn't use her platform to address public education. She didn't mention the poor. She didn't address the human tragedy at the border caused by the president's failed immigration policies. She spent her time trying to pide us instead of trying to unite us. **It 's clear that the most critical issues to the most vulnerable among us will be ignored if we don't have folks in this race bold enough to bring them up.** I need your help to make sure I'm on the December debate stage. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8f9/3eb3e2fc/6831d616/744d2fa9/3568641939/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=11+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191203_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191203_em_fr_b1_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8f9/3eb3e2fc/6831d616/744d2fa8/3568641939/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=20191203_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191203_em_fr_b1_castro_all"). name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: New month, new trade war
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, Growing increasingly unhinged in the White House, Trump's decided to take his frustration out on the American people by starting another trade war. Trump is hurting American consumers right in the middle of the holidays by reimposing tariffs on Argentina and Brazil, two countries allied with the U.S. with shaky economies. In 2016, millions of Democrats stayed home, handing the White House, Senate, House, and the Supreme Court to Donald Trump and the GOP. The same could happen in 2020, which is why we're keeping a close tab on the opinions of the most engaged Democrats in the country. That's why we're asking you now: **Do you approve of Trump 's trade war?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc9f/6e9863e8/16fc027d/1db0a293/3048719895/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/eZFax-lp") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc9f/6e9863e8/16fc027d/1db0a293/3048719895/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/eZFax-lp") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc9f/6e9863e8/16fc027d/1db0a292/3048719895/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191203a.ND&refcode2=TArDSgPfv2wGt1tcnCNE")

subject: Thank you so much for your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lerah Lee for Congress
body:
I'm so thankful to have you on my team. Your support has allowed this campaign to move forward!I'm so thankful to have you on my team. Your support has allowed this campaign to move forward. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_s=e570f0f843d445e59b829ff6ddfad94a&_t=lhiLrDY40a8iKwW6K_p6-JbQBSs-13iKSYMSPRuHEfQ0-rA-RhG1HhLwtTwmS9MYuupWs8hZG9FsdOy55dILeGTzNjgNI0Las3SWfGtxMvDUIBOgCpcfd0fU6E60bHqjreCV2rPYCF-tj4wSz8SOgjxHLi_ECrUjEFzRK2cv9jw%3D) | [](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=e570f0f843d445e59b829ff6ddfad94a&_e=HBdImVLMyasQxepj6ZYeeN57QYnZaEy5_CgHc4Fuk9btQFbBZhGBAw9PlUZRjtqA5r5U-Qg1Mf4arLyLBcA8zaVe_SQP6B1_fjO5oMg9Vl9WIkkH3bvDQbqs_y-UODZXqUiE4k8T4b_t-k6m4Kt5BRkPmB2KjC5aqmRsr8RiZIs-FUhVHMg_60K83ECjl5SKpoEB32KdCFmCiUYjZaFQUF_lH8lJ9VrCuHKHNXbuiqrDIWeSUivTboDMUssChCcfPnTTBv_IQuvJ0aaSFCIl2wyUEamwkF0t8g6Xd5cMk9_pS2OiX9xV7IdeGPGqnXu9)
---
Friend,

Wow. I am feeling so grateful today. Your generosity continues to amaze me.

Because of donors and supporters like you, _**you have**_ allowed us to build a campaign which otherwise would have not been possible.

I’m running for Congress because _**I know**_ that I can help break the gridlock in Washington and produce results not just for Georgians, but for every American _**Citizen**_ – particularly on issues relating to, **ending illegal immigration, rolling back regulations, and strategic and sensible education reform for our children, grandchildren and future generations of Americans that WILL NOT increase federal tax dollars and overburden government**.

From the beginning, the central focus of my campaign has been to be a voice _**that challenges the media narrative that Republicans don’t embrace diversity and suppresses versus encouraging progress**_. Because of your generosity, I’ll be able to continue to speak out in _**defense of the values that our Republican Party holds near and dear to our hearts**_.

Blessings always,
[](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=e570f0f843d445e59b829ff6ddfad94a&_e=HBdImVLMyasQxepj6ZYeeN57QYnZaEy5_CgHc4Fuk9btQFbBZhGBAw9PlUZRjtqA5r5U-Qg1Mf4arLyLBcA8zaVe_SQP6B1_fjO5oMg9Vl8i4FsKgO0hzifCpEFzpWsXGPzSXK6tnop4JfHgwJtohIGmaVhaghCUoQ2f8U47In4EgVgPYh8RkHNNkUnEpazczem1UkXUG2JX411HcLy2MKym6Dy5i_GnxHdhu6XDxd1gJx1_xTGVqdKMu1VVVXuUwq1PXWqxdetNTBjb39hmEmRrx9ifGJ5aCrENWEturO9x8GowBZw6fKkw5d3wIvZo)
Dr. Lerah Lee

P.S: I’m on a mission to uplift ALL Americans, Friend, -- and **[I hope you’ll show your support by making a contribution to my campaign today.](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=e570f0f843d445e59b829ff6ddfad94a&_e=HBdImVLMyasQxepj6ZYeeN57QYnZaEy5_CgHc4Fuk9btQFbBZhGBAw9PlUZRjtqA5r5U-Qg1Mf4arLyLBcA8zaVe_SQP6B1_fjO5oMg9Vl8wgRqTc82-PnAPE52zyAae4uV3KDHsecRRdXYPaBM_OpG7Tl86axFJu61iH_YyKmbHmbCgVY02N4yN92BrTxj3GkyEfhc-XI6UM24o7S1aKjEOsE5d3fq6bSvho5rlNA_QHVaE4MV3ZbdG0mUYH6g5CaPNoWebeacoLA9GuwKyghNgVMfaT0gZ4mxD2tTCkzt3Ozz1Gv3433fowVYweJ8t)**
| [**Donate Today »**](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=e570f0f843d445e59b829ff6ddfad94a&_e=HBdImVLMyasQxepj6ZYeeN57QYnZaEy5_CgHc4Fuk9btQFbBZhGBAw9PlUZRjtqA5r5U-Qg1Mf4arLyLBcA8zW6R1CfR1S48miOopKPjTeyXRBnPo7pnBY7fL-WAm6n2CiokDU8TSlIpD100qeg5aH41_SwdxdYAqGhOpcg41hrD4735r4yZ8ITfFZU9MAxaGRc6i9jM0vZijyzEC5fyyEX4bSd5LKSGgK5sRllBpNoLbDna4KQQvRLcOEGaT1h09mKjgOeOKLajxln16_rjejemlfA8_1YPGRnUavM3DM7H2d3niO6gAikhs5jKczEWWHBMIiL2VL7peSoQzBl8gw%3D%3D)

name: Sara 2020
subject: Susan Collins just went up with yet another attack ad against us.
body:
We have to fight back.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f8e/4bef7a87/6b85d208/287ff91b/4202007921/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
**Susan Collins just went up with yet _another_ attack ad against us.**
Here is the truth: Susan Collins will be able to run a relentless string of attack ads because her campaign is funded almost exclusively by special interests and big-dollar donations made by people who appreciate her Kavanaugh vote and her support of Donald Trump and his agenda.
Our ability to fight back depends on people like you, because the overwhelming majority of the donations we receive come from people giving small amounts. And that means we have to ask:
[**Rush a $3 contribution right away to help us fight back against Republican attacks. We need your help to set the record straight.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f8e/4bef7a87/6b85d208/287ff91a/4202007921/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDMtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191203-full")
We're not just taking on Susan Collins in this election. We are also taking on enormously powerful industries and special interest groups that will spend whatever it takes to preserve the status quo.
We're not saying that to scare you. This race is winnable! If it weren't, Republicans wouldn't be pouring money into attack ads against us!
We say it to remind you that the stakes are high in this race. Democrats _have_ to win in Maine in order to take back the Senate. It won't be easy, but if we are in this together, we can do it.
\- Team Sara
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f8e/4bef7a87/6b85d208/287ff91a/4202007921/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDMtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191203-full")******

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f8e/4bef7a87/6b85d208/287ff919/4202007921/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f8e/4bef7a87/6b85d208/287ff918/4202007921/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7dc/18e32a7f/506d488b/7b22d2ec/256951332/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7dc/18e32a7f/506d488b/7b22d2ed/256951332/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7dc/18e32a7f/506d488b/7b22d2e2/256951332/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben

Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Trump Is Trying to Save NATO By Demanding Members Pay a Fair Share
body:
"President Trump intends to keep pushing at this week’s NATO summit for other alliance members to up their defense spending..." | | | |
---
| | |
# **Trump Is Trying to Save NATO By Demanding Members Pay a Fair Share**

“President Trump intends to keep pushing at this week’s NATO summit for other alliance members to up their defense spending, but it’s worth noting the success he’s already had,” the _New York Post_ editorial board writes.

“Since 2006, each member nation has been supposed to spend 2 percent of GDP on defense. Yet only the United States and two other members hit that mark in 2014, when NATO formally re-committed to the goal. Now eight European countries are on track to meet it this year: Britain, Poland, Estonia, Latvia, Lithuania, Greece, Bulgaria and Romania.”

The bottom line: “For all the complaints that the president has been alienating America’s allies, it sure looks like he has strengthened the most important US alliance.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4b24f5021c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “First lady Melania Trump has officially decked the halls of the White House. This year, the theme is ‘The Spirit of America.’ The 2019 decorative approach features glittery patriotism throughout 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue.” The official White House Christmas Tree arrived last week, Natacha Larnaud reports for [CBS News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=96a022bd2f&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Forgetting the lesson from the boy who cried wolf, Democrats have lost their grip on the public’s attention toward their incessant schemes for dumping President Trump . . . The relentless yammering for a legislative coup is fading into background noise, tuned out by a nation anxious to move ahead,” [_The Washington Times_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=61383ade31&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| With only _seven_ legislative days left in the year, House leadership has all but tabled any real agenda for working Americans, including passing the United States–Mexico–Canada Agreement. Speaker Nancy Pelosi now says she believes “there is not enough time” left this year to vote on USMCA, despite House Democrats spending nearly 30 legislative days on impeachment, Rep. Vicky Hartzler (R-MO) writes in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=262beb5895&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=492bab6478&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f5c28ca5b8&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=193f4f22b1)

| | Giving Tuesday is an incredible movement that began in 2011. Following the biggest shopping days of the year, people around the world promote and give to worthy causes. This year, I'd like you to please consider supporting the **South Texas Pro Bono Asylum Representation Project** , a project of the American Bar Association. They provide critical legal services to detained immigrants and unaccompanied children. Donate Here: [https://donate.americanbar.org/probar](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8fb/3eb3e2fc/6837e8a3/744d298c/2147033052/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://donate.americanbar.org/probar?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+httpsdonateamericanbarorgprobar&utm_campaign=20191203_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191203_em_fr_b2_castro_all"). **We can 't let the crisis at the border be ignored.** We must remember that security doesn't require cruelty, and that compassion is always the right choice. Please support this worthwhile effort. With deep appreciation,
Julian

| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8fb/3eb3e2fc/6837e8a3/744d2988/2147033052/VEsA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=20191203_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191203_em_fr_b2_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8fb/3eb3e2fc/6837e8a3/744d29f7/2147033052/VEsB/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=20191203_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191203_em_fr_b2_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Jason Lewis
subject: Check out the Team Lewis RV!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Lewis for Senate
body:
We’ve picked up a used Fleetwood Tioga RV... and we’ve been raising the money for a little detailing and the engine needs a tune-up so that it’s ready for the miles ahead!
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/e8f7a2e44b310040/55ab652d5dfa5a87c3d6b838967d376c/33183) Fellow Conservative, Did you see my earlier email on this? We’ve picked up a used Fleetwood Tioga RV... and we’ve been raising the money for a little detailing and the engine needs a tune-up so that it’s ready for the miles ahead! [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/e8f7a2e44b310040/65592d8279816703c3d6b838967d376c/33183) The Team Lewis RV was a solid buy - I say that as a lifelong fiscal conservative. We just need to raise funds for a few small projects to get it repaired, reliable, and looking good, and we’re only $1,317 away from our goal. A number of folks have already responded. THANK YOU if you’ve already chipped in. **[If you haven’t yet, then chip in at least $25 dollars today and we'll save you a VIP spot at the ribbon cutting/unveiling, and you'll get to sign your name on the side!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/e8f7a2e44b310040/e71410c95bef4677c3d6b838967d376c/33183)** **[Chip in at least $50 dollars, and you'll have the opportunity for a photo with Jason too!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/e8f7a2e44b310040/abd365ec85caf44ac3d6b838967d376c/33183)** We’ve got a whole lot of ground to cover over the year ahead, to reach voters in every corner of Minnesota, share my message, and rally Republicans to TAKE BACK our great state from the socialist radicals. **[Thank you for any contribution you can help with](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/e8f7a2e44b310040/9e734961b3b4cdfdc3d6b838967d376c/33183)**... I hope you get a chance to check out the RV when we roll in for a stop near you! \- Jason id:2019-10-28-16:44:19:112t
**[Help Fix Up the Team Lewis RV!>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/e8f7a2e44b310040/afd4e74009088d73c3d6b838967d376c/33183)** | |

name: Warren 2020
subject: Elizabeth is fighting to abolish the Electoral College. Are you with her?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
It's wrong and it's undemocratic. Presidential candidates should have to ask every American in every part of the country for their vote, not just a few random states that happen to be close... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b65e/45c30650/11f8659b9/66f9e778/3120609022/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Everyone's vote should count equally -- in every election -- no matter where they live.

But because of the Electoral College, presidential candidates spend the majority of their time in a few battleground states, ignoring the rest of the country.

It's wrong and it's undemocratic. Presidential candidates should have to ask every American in every part of the country for their vote, not just a few random states that happen to be close.

**It's time to abolish the Electoral College and protect our democracy.

Elizabeth is fighting to make it happen -- but in order to put our plans into action, we need a grassroots movement by her side that can win in 2020 and bring big, structural change in 2021.**

[**Will you chip in $2 or anything you can today to say you're in this fight with Elizabeth to abolish the Electoral College?**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b65e/45c30650/11f8659b9/66f9e77b/3120609022/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTA3Rl9FR1JfRUxFX1dfMjAxOTEyMDNfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM07F_EGR_ELE_W_20191203_V1S2_P")

clean_body: It's wrong and it's undemocratic. Presidential candidates should have to ask every American in every part of the country for their vote, not just a few random states that happen to be close... | | | "" Everyone's vote should count equally -- in every election -- no matter where they live. But because of the Electoral College, presidential candidates spend the majority of their time in a few battleground states, ignoring the rest of the country. It's wrong and it's undemocratic. Presidential candidates should have to ask every American in every part of the country for their vote, not just a few random states that happen to be close. It's time to abolish the Electoral College and protect our democracy. Elizabeth is fighting to make it happen -- but in order to put our plans into action, we need a grassroots movement by her side that can win in 2020 and bring big, structural change in 2021. name: Greg Stanton
subject: Join Me For A Night of Pizza and Politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Next Saturday, I would be thrilled if you could join me for a holiday fundraiser in support of my re-election campaign!

This event will take place from 6:00-8:00pm on December 14th at 2832 East Desert Cove Avenue in Northeast Phoenix and will feature delicious pizza from Pizzeria Bianco 🍕🍕🍕. Full details for this fundraiser are on the invite below ⬇️

Please [**RSVP NOW**](https://act.myngp.com/el/mwT6lRTZK0ykk2WksPp-XezMYKNgyg4kMm6p9zQPEiI=/yqKSJxI3S6SW3ye6vcK_TxqUYNL5MHeRmf3qAWhQAOo=) if you plan to attend our holiday fundraiser, or consider making a [**DONATION**](https://act.myngp.com/el/mwT6lRTZK0ykk2WksPp-XezMYKNgyg4kMm6p9zQPEiI=/Uf_1r00EdR1I4k0mE5w9Zh91GmcFqhtzN3JIapU7gjA=?refcode=X_120319_Invite_HolidayFundraiser_A&amount=100) to still show your support if you cannot.

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump is withdrawing the U.S. from the Paris Agreement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, Trump has made it clear throughout his campaign and presidency that he thinks climate change is a hoax and efforts to combat it are hurting businesses. Now, he's taken the bold, reckless, and dangerous step of withdrawing the U.S. from the Paris Agreement, the most comprehensive international treaty combating climate change. With this, he's all but guaranteed that the U.S. will continue polluting at unprecedented levels, dooming us and future generations to a planet wracked by extreme weather and mass extinction due to drastic changes in the environment. [**But we can fight back. We can stand up to the president and tell him we want to be a part of the Paris Agreement and combat the severe damage we 're doing to our own planet. If you agree, please add your name today to demand we remain in the Paris Agreement!**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc80/6e9863e8/16fe635e/1db0a297/3419325990/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/parisclimate/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thank you for standing up for the planet and future generations. The WDTO Team [SIGN NOW](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc80/6e9863e8/16fe635e/1db0a297/3419325990/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/parisclimate/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC")
