name: Laura Loomer
subject: What’s your cause on Giving Tuesday?
body:
Black Friday is over, the excitement of Cyber Monday has passed and today is Giving Tuesday.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-355402-828892-4739442-07b63d91ed-7277a114e7)
Patriot,

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-355402-828892-4739443-d0ede95a39-7277a114e7) Black Friday is over, the excitement of Cyber Monday has passed and today is Giving Tuesday.

It’s a day to support a cause that you believe in . . . a chance to make a change that you believe in.

Here's what I believe:

**I believe the United States is made great because of its people, NOT because of our government.**
Socialist policies and the agenda of the Democrats WILL bring us all down if left unchecked.

* They believe they are better suited than us to make decisions that will impact our lives and families.
* They want to flip our economy, so that our hardest workers see the least benefit.
* Most importantly, **their agenda will weigh-down every single one of us with a MASSIVE tax burden**.

**I’m running for Congress to stop our country from sliding toward socialism, and[I ask that you support my race today](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-355402-828892-4739443-d0ede95a39-7277a114e7).**

There are plenty of causes and candidates to support on Giving Tuesday, and I'm deeply grateful that you would even consider supporting my run.

[Supporting me](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-355402-828892-4739443-d0ede95a39-7277a114e7) comes down to one simple question you ask yourself, “Will Laura Loomer make an impact?”

Here’s how a few other Americans feel when asked that question:

* “I fully endorse Laura Loomer in her quest for Congress. **She has proven herself to be an army of one and embodies fearlessness**.” – Congressman Paul Gosar

* “I can spot a winner, and I can spot a fighter. Laura is both! **She will bring her values and work ethic to Washington to take on the Democrats and socialist left!** I’m proud to be with her all the way to 2020!” – Wayne Allyn Root

* “Help elect a one-woman Free Speech Squad to counter the anti-American congressional Brat Pack. **Disruption, not deference, is the key to defeating the Democratic resistance**.” – Michelle Malkin

I don’t take those quotes about me lightly. I take them as the “minimum job requirements” when I’m elected. I’m not going to let Rep. Gosar, Mrs. Malkin, or Mr. Root down.

I’m not going to let you down.

[**Help me get to Congress by choosing to donate your hard-earned dollars to my campaign.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-355402-828892-4739443-d0ede95a39-7277a114e7)
With the year coming to a close, we have just 28 days to meet our fundraising goal and raise $98,750.

[**Every single dollar you can donate helps us get one step closer.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-355402-828892-4739443-d0ede95a39-7277a114e7)

On Giving Tuesday, [**I ask that you believe in me**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-355402-828892-4739443-d0ede95a39-7277a114e7).

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-355402-828892-84585d41bbe610b-7277a114e7)

name: Jason Yates
subject: Did you forget?
body:
| Time is running out! | [](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p191203apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191203pm_apl01nd&n=1) Peter, **Time is running out! Giving Tuesday ends in just a matter of hours, and we are still shy of our $25,000 goal.** For millions of people, voting can be overwhelming. When is the registration deadline? How do I register? What’s on the ballot? What candidates align with my biblical beliefs? Where’s my polling location? What if I’m out of town on election day? You may not struggle with these questions, but more than **25 million Christians in America do. That’s how many believers will fail to vote** in 2020 _unless_ you help reach them. **For just $3.20 you can equip one Christian voter. That’s roughly the cost of a cup of coffee.** In 2016 and 2018 more than 83% of the people who used our tools actually voted. We need YOUR help to reach more believers in 2020\. Can you commit to equip one voter? Maybe you can equip ten or twenty voters. Whatever the number, if we all do something, we can awaken the most powerful sleeping giant in our nation - 90-million Christians committing to take action by voting in every election. When you [make a donation today](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p191203apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191203pm_apl01nd&n=2) your gift will be doubled dollar for dollar by a generous matching grant Act now so your gift is matched and the impact doubled! [](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p191203apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191203pm_apl01nd&n=3) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191203pm_apl01nd&n=4)
---

name: Action Needed (via 314)
subject: URGENT - ban offshore drilling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
| | [WE HAVE TO TAKE IMMEDIATE ACTION

Call on the Senate to ban offshore drilling >> ](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4239/4bd7760e/452f79ca/77ad1dd4/2485267268/VEsH/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/offshoredrillingJA?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+WE+HAVE+TO+TAKE+IMMEDIATE+ACTION+Call+on&utm_campaign=314_EM_JA_191126_90OP_1_1&source=314_EM_JA_191126_90OP_1_1&refcode=314_EM_JA_191126_90OP_1_1")
---
Offshore drilling poses serious and urgent risks to our health and safety. Oil spills are a dramatic risk for expanded drilling in the Arctic. The Department of Interior's assessment says there is a 75% CHANCE OF AN OIL SPILL.

We can't let that happen. [ Tell the Senate it's time to ban offshore drilling once and for all.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4239/4bd7760e/452f79ca/77ad1dd3/2485267268/VEsE/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/offshoredrillingJA?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-++Tell+the+Senate+itrsquos+time+to+ban+of&utm_campaign=314_EM_JA_191126_90OP_1_1&source=314_EM_JA_191126_90OP_1_1&refcode=314_EM_JA_191126_90OP_1_1")

The House of Representatives has already passed a bill to ban any new offshore drilling because they understand the risks: respiratory diseases, air pollution, and ecosystem-devastating oil spills. But Mitch McConnell refuses to even put it to a vote in the Senate.

[Add your name and tell Mitch McConnell it's time to ban offshore drilling >>](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4239/4bd7760e/452f79ca/77ad1dd2/2485267268/VEsF/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/offshoredrillingJA?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name+and+tell+Mitch+McConnell+i&utm_campaign=314_EM_JA_191126_90OP_1_1&source=314_EM_JA_191126_90OP_1_1&refcode=314_EM_JA_191126_90OP_1_1")

We can't create change without your help.
| [SIGN NOW](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4239/4bd7760e/452f79ca/77ad1dd1/2485267268/VEsC/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/offshoredrillingJA?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+SIGN+NOW&utm_campaign=314_EM_JA_191126_90OP_1_1&source=314_EM_JA_191126_90OP_1_1&refcode=314_EM_JA_191126_90OP_1_1")
---
Thank you for taking action,

Th 314 Action Team

Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action.org, not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee.
---

**[Click here to unsubscribe from 314 Action's email list.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4239/4bd7760e/452f79ca/77ad1dd0/2485267268/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiI0NTJmNzljYSIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6IjI5YmI0MjM5In0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/oneclickunsubscribe/452f79ca/29bb4239?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5+-+Click+here+to++unsubscribe+from+314+Acti&utm_campaign=314_EM_JA_191126_90OP_1_1&source=314_EM_JA_191126_90OP_1_1&refcode=314_EM_JA_191126_90OP_1_1")**

314 Action is a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4239/4bd7760e/452f79ca/77ad1ddf/2485267268/VEsA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=6+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_JA_191126_90OP_1_1&source=314_EM_JA_191126_90OP_1_1")** to make a donation.

name: Team Yang
subject: This is our chance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
No one will be able to discount Andrew or the Yang Gang when we outperform the media and establishment’s expectations.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=4062%2E377263%2ES9XHml) Yang Gang --

In exactly two months, the first caucus will happen in Iowa. That means we have two months to do everything we can to make sure Andrew comes out on top.

We need all hands on deck. The Iowa caucus requires very personal, people-focused organizing. Our team is pouring their hearts and souls into this campaign. But they can’t do it without your help.

[Can you chip in right now to give our organizers in Iowa the support they need right now? ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18732?t=5&akid=4062%2E377263%2ES9XHml)

The Iowa Caucus will prove to be one of the most consequential moments of our campaign.

No one will be able to discount Andrew or the Yang Gang when we outperform the media and establishment’s expectations. This is our chance to prove all the naysayers wrong. And it starts right now.

[Anything you can contribute right now will help us win in one of the most important contests of this campaign. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18732?t=8&akid=4062%2E377263%2ES9XHml) | [Chip in](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18732?t=7&akid=4062%2E377263%2ES9XHml)
---
We can make waves on February 3rd if we have you by our side.

Together, we will win.

Team Yang
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Chip in](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18732?t=6&akid=4062%2E377263%2ES9XHml)

clean_body: No one will be able to discount Andrew or the Yang Gang when we outperform the media and establishment’s expectations. | Yang Gang -- In exactly two months, the first caucus will happen in Iowa. That means we have two months to do everything we can to make sure Andrew comes out on top. We need all hands on deck. The Iowa caucus requires very personal, people-focused organizing. Our team is pouring their hearts and souls into this campaign. But they can’t do it without your help. The Iowa Caucus will prove to be one of the most consequential moments of our campaign. No one will be able to discount Andrew or the Yang Gang when we outperform the media and establishment’s expectations. This is our chance to prove all the naysayers wrong. And it starts right now. | We can make waves on February 3rd if we have you by our side. Together, we will win. Team Yang We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now. |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: Diversity demolished in the Democratic primary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | Months ago, the Democratic Party had on its debate stage the most diverse field of candidates in its history. Now, months later, we're in real danger of losing that diversity altogether. With the news of Senator Harris dropping out of the race, there are currently no people of color who have hit the DNC's threshold to qualify for the December debate. _[We need your support right now to make sure we change that. We have just 9 days left to boost our numbers and we're just a few thousand donors away from meeting the donor requirements. Please chip in now. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-diversity?refcode=20191203_em_fr_b3_castro_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+We+need+your+support+right+now+to+make+s&utm_campaign=20191203_em_fr_b3_castro_all-1&source=20191203_em_fr_b3_castro_all-1")_ If we lose this diversity, we risk not having someone in this race who will speak to the issues and experiences that are too often ignored. _[I've worked hard to champion everyone, please don't let us fall behind. Give what you can today. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-diversity?refcode=20191203_em_fr_b3_castro_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+Irsquove+worked+hard+to+champion+everyon&utm_campaign=20191203_em_fr_b3_castro_all-1&source=20191203_em_fr_b3_castro_all-1")_ Sincerely, Julian

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8fd/3eb3e2fc/683f78f2/744d2bb1/2933530341/VEsA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=6+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191203_em_fr_b3_castro_all-1&source=20191203_em_fr_b3_castro_all-1")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8fd/3eb3e2fc/683f78f2/744d2bb0/2933530341/VEsB/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=20191203_em_fr_b3_castro_all-1&source=20191203_em_fr_b3_castro_all-1"). name: Monika Johnson-Hostler
subject: Thanks for a great November.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONIKA FOR CONGRESS
body:
I believe a public official should answer to the people.

| [](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d925/7dfbb003/42af3eda/5527bfd9/3636238703/VEsH/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191203_em_eomthanks&recurring=auto&refcode2=header&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=rtw_20191203_em_eomthanks&source=rtw_20191203_em_eomthanks")
---
Friend,

I'm running for my daughter and her classmates in Wake County Public Schools.

I'm running for my husband and his coworkers who teach in Wake County Public Schools.

I'm running for my neighbors, fellow mothers, and everyone who lives in North Carolina's 2nd District who hasn't felt represented in Congress.

I'm running for _you_ --because I believe a public official should answer to the people, not corporations or dark money. You should always be able to go to the person who represents you.

Every time you send in a donation, open an email from my team, or answer a survey--you're investing in a leader with integrity. And that's a promise I will stand by.

**Thank you for supporting me in November and beyond!**

Monika Johnson-Hostler

Candidate for NC-02
---
| | | Monika Johnson-Hostler is running for Congress to give the people of North Carolina's 2nd District a representative who will listen, work hard, and stay true to their word, doing what's best for the district. As the District 2 member of the Wake County school board and Executive Director of North Carolina's Coalition Against Sexual Assault, Monika knows how to lead with solutions. For Monika Johnson-Hostler, serving people is about integrity, and that's what she'll bring to Congress. [CONTRIBUTE](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d925/7dfbb003/42af3eda/5527bfde/3636238703/VEsE/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191203_em_eomthanks&recurring=auto&refcode2=biobox&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=2+-+CONTRIBUTE&utm_campaign=rtw_20191203_em_eomthanks&source=rtw_20191203_em_eomthanks")
---

PAID FOR BY MONIKA FOR CONGRESS

Monika for Congress
PO BOX 99092
Raleigh, NC 27624
United States

This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. To unsubscribe, go to: https://monika.bsd.net/unsubscribe.

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: UPDATE: The People's Pledge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390977/55b66746/2d4d57fd/80f14d8/1050476096/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | The first "People's Pledge" was crafted in Massachusetts in 2012, in the blockbuster Senate race that sent Elizabeth Warren to the U.S. Senate. **The premise was simple: No. Dark. Money.** Liz Warren and her GOP opponent agreed to eschew any and all unaccountable, unlimited and outside spending on their behalf. No Super PACs, no independent expenditures, no DC campaign committees, no party apparatuses, no interest groups (no, not even the ones Democrats like!) -- just individual donations from real people. **It was an ironclad commitment to the grassroots. **And today, I'm calling for the same thing in my primary race for the U.S. Senate. Yesterday we made big progress -- one of my two primary opponents agreed to keep dark money out and we formally signed a 2020 People's Pledge. We're not quite finished, though; the People's Pledge doesn't take effect until all three declared candidates sign it. And Senator Ed Markey has declined to add his name so far. We need to show him how important this issue is -- and make it clear that Democrats can't just talk the talk on campaign finance, we need to walk the walk. **[Let's prove what a grassroots campaign is made of. Chip in now to fuel the fight for a clean, transparent election decided by](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390977/55b66746/2d4d57fd/80f14d9/1050476096/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg body:

| | |
---
| [The second Tax of Christmas the Democrats gave to me.... A Plastic & Paper Bag Fee](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzAzMDY0MjAxNzY5NTIyMjA5JmM9ajJyNCZlPTE5MjgmYj0yOTg1MTE3NzQmZD12MGc5czhi.PX5_Ye6emxSPWImjTAQVPy76XZyB78WXAkbTOD73zek)
---
---
| |
---
| Derek, New Hampshire Democrats are trying to ruin your holiday shopping!
---
---
| | | [](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzAzMDY0MjAxNzY5NTIyMjA5JmM9ajJyNCZlPTE5MjgmYj0yOTg1MTE3ODImZD10OHIwYjBz.EbZmn5wuf7_ZyAbp3bl5afUVaFeyOhIDfATfQKYEDX8)
---
| |
---
| They plan to make it more expensive for you to use plastic & paper bags when you're shopping and preparing for the holidays. That means it'll be cost more to bring home the holiday shopping and that Christmas Eve take-out meal. Hope you're good at wrapping because there will be no more gift bags!

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Impeachment Alert: New Hearings Start Tomorrow
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Patriot,
Tomorrow I get my first chance to participate in the impeachment hearings, but the cards are stacked against me. Adam Schiff, Jerry Nadler, and Nancy Pelosi have created an unprecedented and unfair process in order to remove President Trump from office.
Republicans have not been able to call our own witnesses, and now Jerry Nadler scheduled tomorrow's hearing while the President is abroad. The Democrats will use every dirty trick in the book in order to impeach the President and slow down all the progress we've made.
No matter the circumstances, I will always stand with President Trump.
I need to know that I have your support going into the hearings. Do you have my back as I go to battle with the D.C. Swamp tomorrow?

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Heidi?=
subject: Fighting back against racist policing
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f7e43ece2dd8/fighting-back-against-racist-policing?e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| | | [ ](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=9fafe36129&e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| | | Hey

Please read this email from my good friend Chris Harris on how we can organize to change our deeply racist system of policing here in Central Texas:

* * *

Good morning, I hope everyone had a nice relaxing holiday. As many of you know, [credible allegations have been made](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=9cba4b817e&e=c169cb0a8e) that an Assistant Chief of the Austin Police Department repeatedly used racial slurs towards black people over many years with full knowledge of other chiefs and that a 2nd Assistant Chief tried to send a family member to [conversion therapy](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=aed64df5e1&e=c169cb0a8e).

City council will consider [this resolution](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=c9dcde22b2&e=c169cb0a8e) in response to these allegations this Thursday (12/5). It represents a strong initial response though we are still seeking some tweaks. If you have any additional questions or desired changes, please let me know ASAP. As it stands, the resolution directs the city manager to:
* Investigate communications across the entire police department for bigotry, including social media akin to the powerful [Plain View Project](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=739c9b6dbe&e=c169cb0a8e) from last year,
* Analyze the entire scope of police-citizen interactions over a 5 year period for evidence of bias and all complaints of discrimination against officers, and
* Overhaul the new hire training process and most crucially of all - _delay any new cadet classes until this has been completed_.

**We need folks to show up at City Hall on Thursday @ 6:30pm to support it and ensure it doesn't get watered down.** If you can make it, please [sign up here](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=11cc6dddf5&e=c169cb0a8e) to either speak or donate time. Please see the attached flyer to hand out.

If you want more background on the issue and/or help with prepping remarks for Thursday, please let me know. I'll also be hosting an online meeting on Wednesday, 12/4 at 8pm with updates so hit me up if you want to be on the invite list. Please let me know if you have any other questions or need any support to show up!

Regards,

Chris Harris
Advocate | Analyst | Organizer
Pronouns: he, him, his

512-897-0703 _[@chrisharris101](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=50498197da&e=c169cb0a8e)_

“There’s class warfare, all right, but it’s my class, the rich class, that’s making war, and we’re winning.” - Warren Buffett, [2006](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=e3adaa6b5f&e=c169cb0a8e)

name: Senator Erica Smith
subject: I Filed Today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica for US
body:
Dear Supporter,
I am excited to share with you that today I pledged and declared my candidacy for the Democratic Party nomination to unseat Republican Thom Tillis as the state's junior United States Senator. When elected, I will be North Carolina's first African American U.S. Senator, and only the third African American woman ever to serve in that body.
We can stop the slide of our country into darkness and begin restoring a healthy, decent world but only if Democrats field candidates next November who can inspire massive voter turnout among the young, the marginalized, people of color, women, and the rural poor. I believe I am called to be that candidate for the United States Senate.
Every poll of this race has found me to be the frontrunner, beating Tillis by wider margins than any other likely Democratic challenger.

You already know me as a proud native North Carolinian and resident of Henrico who has served for three terms in the state's General Assembly; as a former member of the Northampton County Board of Education; as former chair of the Northampton County Democratic Party; as an ordained clergywomen; as a graduate of the North Carolina School of Science and Mathematics and North Carolina A&T State University; as a professional with careers at Boeing, the US Patent and Trademark Office, and, today, as a science and mathematics educator who is a teacher of teachers.

Now is the time to spread the word to make sure that all North Carolinians have the opportunity to get to know me as you all know me. I am **One of US for ALL of US** and I truly appreciate your support of my candidacy! I am ready to do the work of the people, with the people, and for the people of North Carolina as your next United States Senator. I am IN IT to WIN IT!

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/a6Ht7qpOtUPdvBKZ2wv4lHNYnfC774C-9QrPScryJRo=/5v0RDvmpe23daXAJNuIbnFFPEeOS4rUlGCXeSbS217M=)

name: Cory Booker
subject: Long before she was a presidential candidate or a U.S. Senator, Kamala Harris was my friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
Friend,
Long before she was a presidential candidate or a U.S. Senator, Kamala Harris was my friend and my sister. We may have been competitors this last year, but it was with sadness that I learned Kamala announced she's ending her campaign.
Kamala Harris's campaign changed this country. So many people got to see -- for the first time -- someone who looked like them on a presidential debate stage. Someone fighting fearlessly and unapologetically for a better future for them.
I'm so proud of her for championing values we share, and know she'll continue that fight as strong as ever. I pledge to do the same.
\- Cory
P.S. It's been a joy every time we've run into each other on the trail. Here are a few of my favorite moments.
| Paid for by Cory 2020

clean_body: Friend, Long before she was a presidential candidate or a U.S. Senator, Kamala Harris was my friend and my sister. We may have been competitors this last year, but it was with sadness that I learned Kamala announced she's ending her campaign. Kamala Harris's campaign changed this country. So many people got to see -- for the first time -- someone who looked like them on a presidential debate stage. Someone fighting fearlessly and unapologetically for a better future for them. I'm so proud of her for championing values we share, and know she'll continue that fight as strong as ever. I pledge to do the same. \- Cory P.S. It's been a joy every time we've run into each other on the trail. Here are a few of my favorite moments. | Paid for by Cory 2020 P.O. name: Team Weld
subject: Ballot Access Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23RnSat4TMYqqOIv68rWpj3Sofav5d_Pvs2wIP4cfL1ftgP7DbiIggdSprhjZ_MR1A&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191203fr&n=1) Hey Team — Don’t know if you saw Natalie’s email on Sunday, but we have some good news and some bad news over here. **The good news:** we’re officially on the primary ballot in six states! In fact, by the end of this week, we’ll have submitted paperwork to appear on the primary ballot in six more states as well. **The bad news:** we’re not done yet... there are still a handful of ballots to get on, and our team is working around the clock to submit the paperwork before the various deadlines (let alone keep track of them all!). Not only are these deadlines coming up fast, but so are the primaries. And with President Trump’s massive war chest giving him the cash to blast his message across your social media feeds and airwaves, we’re doing everything we can to continue _to raise money and spend it smarter._ That’s why we need your help. _We’re going to keep pushing and challenging President Trump in all 50 states, and**[we need you in the fight.](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23RnSat4TMYqqOIv68rWpj3Sofav5d_Pvs2wIP4cfL1ftgP7DbiIggdSprhjZ_MR1A&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191203fr&n=2)**_ | [CHIP IN NOW ⇨](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23RnSat4TMYqqOIv68rWpj3Sofav5d_Pvs2wIP4cfL1ftgP7DbiIggdSprhjZ_MR1A&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191203fr&n=3)
---
As we get closer to the December ballot deadlines, your continued support is critical.
Time and again, you’ve come through for us. But this is important, and we’re asking for your help once more.
**[Can we count on you to chip in $50 to help us fund our ballot access operations?](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23RnSat4TMYqqOIv68rWpj3Sofav5d_Pvs2wIP4cfL1ftgP7DbiIggdSprhjZ_MR1A&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191203fr&n=4)**
| [SUPPORT THE BALLOT ACCESS FUND ⇨](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23RnSat4TMYqqOIv68rWpj3Sofav5d_Pvs2wIP4cfL1ftgP7DbiIggdSprhjZ_MR1A&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191203fr&n=5)
---
Thank you for all you do,
Team Weld
Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191203fr&n=6).
You can also keep up with Team Weld on [Twitter](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEee0J3CzZBj8v0TKy2tYMM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191203fr&n=7) or [Facebook](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191203fr&n=8).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191203fr&n=9), software for leaders.

Time and again, you’ve come through for us. But this is important, and we’re asking for your help once more. | Thank you for all you do, Team Weld Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janet=20Barresi?=
subject: The impeachment circus is kicking into high gear
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANET BARRESI FOR CONGRESS
body:
Democrats have failed to deliver solutions. Let's vote them out. |
---
| | Peter, Today, Democrats are kicking their impeachment sham against President Trump into high gear, and it's a perfect illustration of why we have to vote them out in 2020.

They're going to be stacking the House Judiciary Committee with 3 far-left partisan "experts on constitutional law" to argue for overturning President Trump's 2016 election. Frankly, it's disturbing partisan extremism.

Meanwhile, they will allow Republicans only ONE witness to testify on behalf of the will of the American people. Republicans have to win back the House in 2020 to stop these circus show-trials.

But we need your help to make that happen. Oklahoma's 5th Congressional District is going to be the epicenter of the fight to take back the House in 2020.

[**Will you donate just $5, $10, $15, $25, or even $50 to help us kick liberal Democrat Kendra Horn out of office and stop this partisan witch-hunt?**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=508e5be587&e=795c6d9796)

Horn is one of the reasons this impeachment is proceeding in the first place. A few weeks ago, she teamed up with Nancy Pelosi and AOC's so-called "squad" to open the inquiry and overturn the 2016 election. She calls herself a moderate, but we know better -- she has voted with Pelosi 85% of the time.

The Associated Press has called this district "a seat both parties expect to work fiercely to win in 2020." National Journal said this is the **nation's #1 battleground district** , and Decision Desk HQ said "OK-5 is guaranteed to be one of 2020's most bitterly fought House elections."

We need your help to win. This will be a fight like no other across the country.

[**Will you contribute $5, $10, $15, $25, or even $50 to help us fight liberal Democrats and take back the House for conservatives in 2020?**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=453990a0d4&e=795c6d9796)

Thanks so much!

For Freedom, -Janet Barresi

Despite President Trump’s heroic efforts to protect our right to bear arms, **_the campaign to take away our guns is alive and well_** - _even in Montana_!

This isn’t the will of the people but an agenda pushed by liberal billionaires, like Michael Bloomberg, who are spending _millions_ of dollars to take away our guns.

This radical liberal agenda is dangerous and shows why **[it’s vital Republicans hold the Senate majority in 2020.](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=239cae2d2fef4fe8a2c59805d70539c1&_e=4wf55h_ycEEAGoZ5jdPmHQsPbRu1OY5dJYh4qWbWphyd1fxhxQeRrZwkSHyw8VKAeP2b2iEq13fERkVy_w1VgKHCy0jik3zQzUc2qRq-4F8g07Hqas1L4-fWPr7fGpyD3umRCNUnfEffHPo2G_AJy9K2a6uv31DwRVNpuCYd0xgcb3cVNlanMJbOcc2r49Jt2EjA99ue52RvSdl-od9oILJwc1h76o2FekG-V7R2StwlJZ3ElugOyVqmNo9dJOPmLJY5Gm8IZyLQW1L9LeFD7V0drAYB0k1Pp8MQ36Jq5g35Ai2gRFSg7JNhaTFEvXgN1aYm2dM0vOrYRp0If2XE1XDNFeJcIgqEvGQoYPoaSf_JmJyJNTQPAghrzao6w6Nx)**

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Mitch McConnell and Trump could nominate more Supreme Court justices if they win in 2020
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, In the last decades, the Supreme Court has recognized the progressive values of our Constitution and country \-- they upheld women's rights, affirmed gay marriage, and ordered desegregation nationwide. But Mitch McConnell decided he didn't like progress, so he blocked President Obama's final Supreme Court nominee from being confirmed and cemented a GOP majority on the bench for a generation with Trump nominees Neil Gorsuch and Brett Kavanaugh. Since then, the Court has upheld restrictions to abortion, allowed Trump's Muslim ban to go into effect, and are now poised to destroy _Roe v. Wade_ and DACA. Mitch McConnell and the GOP will do anything to keep control of power, so if Democrats want any shot at taking back the Supreme Court and restoring progressive values, we must take back the Senate. We're trying to shape our 2020 Election Strategy, and we can't do that if we don't know where involved Democrats stand on this issue: **Do you approve of Mitch McConnell 's Supreme Court meddling?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc82/6e9863e8/16fba65b/1db0bd58/21537217/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/3CsujNLd") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc82/6e9863e8/16fba65b/1db0bd58/21537217/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/3CsujNLd") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc82/6e9863e8/16fba65b/1db0bd5f/21537217/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191203c.ND&refcode2=nB8rHXWcc5BjqMDoOlpA")

She's ready to get to work with a new Senate to expand access to health care, take swift action on climate change, and keep our communities safe from gun violence. If you want to make sure it 's Scenario 2, we need your help NOW to win this race! name: Trump Alert!
subject: re: electoral college
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| | |
---
| | **BREAKING: **New polls suggest Trump could lose the popular vote by a wider margin than in 2016 but still win the Electoral College _- _and the presidency _ - again! _
---
**Team, we 're missing your response:
Should we abolish the Electoral College?**
---
| | | [YES](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MTY2NjQ4MDMS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDE5MTE0MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| [NO](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MTY2NjQ4MDMS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDE5MTE0MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
This is catastrophic, Team: Trump's job approval ratings clearly show that a majority of Americans think his presidency is a disaster. But a recent New York Times analysis finds that Donald Trump _could_ _lose the popular vote by an unprecedented margin_ **- but still WIN the Electoral College and be reelected.**
Democratic governors are leading the charge to change the Electoral College as we know it. They want to ensure that everyone's vote is counted equally - and that the president is the person who gets the most votes from the American people, period.
**The Electoral College could have _massive_**** consequences in 2020, so we need to hear from 3,465 more Democrats before midnight tonight.** **Tell us by 11:59 p.m. for your response to be counted:**
| | **Should we abolish the Electoral College?**
---
| | | [YES](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MTY2NjQ4MDMS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDE5MTE0MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| [NO](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MTY2NjQ4MDMS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDE5MTE0MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the DGA email list, [click here](https://www.pages02.net/democraticgovernorsassoc/unsubscribe/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=16664803&spUserID=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&spJobID=MTc4MDE5MTE0MQS2&spReportId=MTc4MDE5MTE0MQS2). | | Paid for by Democratic Governors Association.
---

name: Jenny Nadicksbernd
subject: A full-on GOP offensive
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Trump and his allies in the GOP are mounting a full-on offensive to take Virginia back.
|
---
| | **The GOP is mounting a full-on offensive in Virginia.** **[Donate now to fight back!](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d77c/53d9897e/53ec908c/1c89eef8/1652769963/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM3MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-keepvablue?refcode=20191203_f_1_nd__372__&refcode2=top&amount=5")** Derek,

**First** -- The Trump campaign set up its headquarters in Virginia, signaling that they intend to win our Commonwealth in 2020.

**Then** -- Multiple Republican opponents entered Virginia's Senate race hoping to unseat Mark Warner and turn the Commonwealth red. **One of these candidates voted with Trump 98% of the time when he was in Congress.**

**NOW -- We need to fight back. [Will you donate right now to make sure Mark stays in the Senate and continues working hard for us?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d77c/53d9897e/53ec908c/1c89eee7/1652769963/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM3MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-keepvablue?refcode=20191203_f_1_nd__372__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Trump and his allies in the GOP are mounting a full-on offensive to take Virginia back. If we don't want to see all of our hard-earned progress go down the drain next year, we have to build the strongest campaign we've ever had. Mark will be the only Democrat running a statewide campaign in 2020. We need to be sure that this campaign is strong enough to lift up the Democratic candidates running in communities across Virginia.

We're heading into an _intense_ election year, Derek. **We need your support to make sure Mark has all the resources he needs to successfully win re-election in 2020. Will you chip in now to help Mark build a strong campaign that can beat Donald Trump and his allies and keep Virginia blue?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: ❗ Here's the House Impeachment Report...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c455/6cd27893/52c34e11/1587a75c/3824918905/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | The House Intelligence Committee has just released their Trump-Ukraine Impeachment Inquiry Report, and you can read it here: [Read the Report](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c455/6cd27893/52c34e11/1587a75d/3824918905/VEsE/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.cnn.com/2019/12/03/politics/trump-impeachment-report-doc/index.html") It's a long document, but the first 36 pages -- which includes the Committee's Preface, the Executive Summary, and the Key Findings of Fact -- will give you a very good idea of what the House Intelligence Committee found. This is a powerful report marshaling damning evidence. In the report's words, President Trump "solicited the interference of a foreign government, Ukraine, to benefit his re-election." It says that "the President placed his own personal and political interests above the national interests of the United States," endangering our national security. And the Committee assembled this evidence in spite of what the report calls "an unprecedented campaign of obstruction by the President and his Administration to prevent the Committees from obtaining documentary evidence and testimony." Please take some time to review the Committee's findings. It's important. [Read the Report](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c455/6cd27893/52c34e11/1587a75d/3824918905/VEsF/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.cnn.com/2019/12/03/politics/trump-impeachment-report-doc/index.html") _Jeff_ |

PO Box 14172, Portland, OR 97293.

Email is an important way for Senator Merkley to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? [Contact us here.](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c455/6cd27893/52c34e11/1587a756/3824918905/VEsO/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.jeffmerkley.com/contact/") |

name: Amy Mesner, SaraGideon.com
subject: A detailed look into how Susan Collins is funding her campaign.
body:
Check out these numbers:
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f93/4bef7a87/6b988844/287fe6ae/1970700875/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
Here's how Susan Collins is funding her campaign.
-> **62 percent** of her money comes from people contributing $200 or more
-> **22 percent** -- or $1.9 million -- came from political action committees
-> **Only 10 percent** came from donors below the $200 threshold.
Meanwhile, Sara Gideon is rejecting all corporate PAC donations, and our average online donation last quarter was just $27.56.
**We 're proud of our commitment to funding our campaign the right way - but it does mean I have to ask:**
[**Will you make a $3 contribution to support our people-powered campaign? Your donation will help us win in Maine, flip the Senate, and finally kick Mitch McConnell out as Majority Leader.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f93/4bef7a87/6b988844/287fe6ad/1970700875/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDMtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191203-2-full")
Thanks in advance for your contribution. Susan Collins may have special interests and billionaires like Sheldon Adelson on her side -_but we have you_. That's why we're going to win.
All my best,
Amy Mesner
Campaign Manager
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f93/4bef7a87/6b988844/287fe6ad/1970700875/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDMtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191203-2-full")******

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f93/4bef7a87/6b988844/287fe6a3/1970700875/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: Maya Rupert
subject: Breaking: #LetJuliánDebate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | Friend, With Senator Kamala Harris' exit from this race, we know it's more important than ever to have Julian on the debate stage. We're in serious danger of having no candidates of color on stage. That's a problem. I'm proud of the campaign we've run that highlights the issues that not just the middle class voters face, but also the struggles of the poor. Time and time again Julian goes where other candidates won't, and speaks to issues others are too afraid, or too calculated to address. [We need you to chip in right now to help get him back on the stage. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8ff/3eb3e2fc/68c74d80/744d35a9/1147102774/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-diversity?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+We+need+you+to+chip+in+right+now+to+help&utm_campaign=20191203_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191203_em_fr_b4_castro_all") Despite the media hosts of the debate not asking, Julian has talked about policing reform, the housing crisis, and reproductive justice, including for members of the trans community, while he was on stage. We saw what happens when he's not on stage. Important issues and vulnerable communities are ignored. Let's show that Democrats are the party of diversity. [Chip in right now to make sure that doesn't happen again.>>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8ff/3eb3e2fc/68c74d80/744d35a8/1147102774/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-diversity?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+Chip+in+right+now+to+make+sure+that+does&utm_campaign=20191203_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191203_em_fr_b4_castro_all") Let's do it, Maya Rupert Campaign Manager Julian for the Future

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8ff/3eb3e2fc/68c74d80/744d3594/1147102774/VEsA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=6+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191203_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191203_em_fr_b4_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8ff/3eb3e2fc/68c74d80/744d3593/1147102774/VEsB/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=20191203_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191203_em_fr_b4_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8ff/3eb3e2fc/68c74d80/744d3592/1147102774/VEsO/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=20191203_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191203_em_fr_b4_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

clean_body: | | | | | | | Friend, With Senator Kamala Harris' exit from this race, we know it's more important than ever to have Julian on the debate stage. We're in serious danger of having no candidates of color on stage. That's a problem. I'm proud of the campaign we've run that highlights the issues that not just the middle class voters face, but also the struggles of the poor. Time and time again Julian goes where other candidates won't, and speaks to issues others are too afraid, or too calculated to address. "" Despite the media hosts of the debate not asking, Julian has talked about policing reform, the housing crisis, and reproductive justice, including for members of the trans community, while he was on stage. We saw what happens when he's not on stage. Important issues and vulnerable communities are ignored. Let's show that Democrats are the party of diversity. "" Let's do it, Maya Rupert Campaign Manager Julian for the Future | | | | | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | julianforthefuture.com | | Paid for by Julian for the Future | Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper. Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates. We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge: Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign? "" Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know "". If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe "", and we'll make sure to process your request.

| Yesterday, _Governor Bullock finally dropped out as a candidate for President_. While this misguided and destined-to-fail campaign may be laughable what's not funny is just how far to the left Bullock has gone since he announced his candidacy.

**But, Bullock is not alone.**

_-Elizabeth Warren is demanding the end of the electoral college.
-Schiff and Pelosi are hell-bent on impeaching President Trump.
-Joe Biden (the frontrunner) is biting his wife's finger on stage.
-Gun confiscation, tax increases, and socialism are all mainstream in the Democratic party. _

The Democrats are a mess....and it's all because they can't control their hatred of President Trump.
**President Trump needs allies at all levels of government. Help us fight the unhinged Democrats by Donating Now!!!**

_**Troy on the Campaign Trail**_
Over the last few weeks, Troy met with community members, bankers, county commissioners, and small business owners discussing the importance of choice and affordable premiums in the insurance industry, transparency in government, and streamlining regulations allowing entrepreneurs to thrive while fighting hard to protect all Montanas from bad actors in Insurance and Securities. Troy is also a strong advocate for our Montana State Trust Lands and will work tirelessly to promote true stewardship, supporting vital Montana industry, and raising much needed money to support our public education system. As the owner of a Gallatin County-based small business, Troy knows the importance of supporting local small business and the strains unique to small business owners. Troy will work hard to give choice and help lower premiums in both Health and Worker’s Compensation insurance.
---
| | Troy’s Quote of the week:
“True transparency in hospital billing practices will lead to a more educated consumer, more competition, and pressure for better pricing for medical care.”

Congratulations to the MSU Bobcats on a decisive victory.

body:

| | | We're bumping this email up in your inbox to make sure you've had a chance to see if your name is in danger of being purged on December 15th. Read our email below and use our Voter Purge Tool to see if there's any action you need to take to stay on the rolls!
* * *
Friend - Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger is planning to purge over 300,000 voters from the rolls next month. **Your right to vote could be at risk.** [**So we created the Fair Fight Voter Purge Tool to help voters check if they are on the list and take the necessary steps to stay on the rolls. Enter your information and make sure your voting status is not at risk.**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5bb/34a064cc/1b1a7003/703633b/1250760726/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMjAzMTlWUFQtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/voter-purge?source=IE120319VPT-1-full") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5bb/34a064cc/1b1a7003/703633b/1250760726/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMjAzMTlWUFQtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/voter-purge?source=IE120319VPT-1-full") You can check to see if you (or another voter) are on the list by entering your information into our new voter purge lookup tool: [**StopThePurge.com**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5bb/34a064cc/1b1a7003/703633b/1250760726/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMjAzMTlWUFQtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/voter-purge?source=IE120319VPT-1-full") We can't let Brian Kemp's legacy of voter suppression continue on uninterrupted. Fair Fight is committed to holding the Secretary of State's office accountable. But doing so will take resources. If you can, chip in and help us keep up the fight to protect the right to vote. **[DONATE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5bb/34a064cc/1b1a7003/7036338/1250760726/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMjAzMTlWUFQtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE120319VPT-1-full")** Thank you in advance, \- Team Fair Fight

Every day, more Democratic moderates drop out of the Presidential primary.

Now more than ever, we need John's voice out there. Americans deserve a President who has a thought-out and pragmatic vision for the future of this country.

John's campaign and his positions are rooted in the conversations he's had with tens of thousands of Iowans in all 99 counties over the past two years.

That's because John is running a campaign by and for the people. He's not full of talking points. Instead, he's talking _to people_. He's talking about the real change he will make as president.

We need to keep spreading the word about John's mission to turn big ideas into real solutions for our country.

**Help us get out our message by chipping in right now:**

**[https://go.johndelaney.com/Donate](https://go.johndelaney.?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jkd_fr_q42019?refcode=em_fr_2019.12.03_e1_td_iowa_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=1,5,35,50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Silver Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=8+-+httpsgojohndelaneycomDonate&utm_campaign=em_fr_2019.12.03_e1_td_iowa_all&source=em_fr_2019.12.03_e1_td_iowa_all")**

body:
| | | | Support a government that supports giving!

**—**
History has been kind to Jimmy Carter. Carter was president at a time of great economic tumult, but he never let the winds of discontent blow him over. No matter what, Carter remained a giving man - a man who rolls up his sleeves to help people in need - who understands that our nation is only strong when we take care of each other.
Let's take a page out of Jimmy Carter's book.
This Giving Tuesday, donate to your favorite charity, but also [invest in](vhttps://secure.actblue.com/donate/khalilpeter?utf8=✓&amount=&commit=Contribute) candidates who support people over profit. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump is getting NATO back on track for American taxpayers
body:
This week, world leaders are gathering in London for the 2019 North Atlantic Treaty Organization (NATO) Summit, celebrating 70 years since... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b80165b281&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • December 3, 2019
---
| | |
# **President Trump is getting NATO back on track for American taxpayers **

**This week,** world leaders are gathering in London for the 2019 North Atlantic Treaty Organization (NATO) Summit, celebrating 70 years since the beginning of the historic Western alliance.

**For decades, NATO members** worked together to confront the world’s toughest challenges. But, the alliance’s ability to accomplish that mission became severely weakened. In 2017, when President Trump took office, only _four_ of our NATO allies were meeting their defense spending obligations under the treaty. Meanwhile, past U.S. leaders—along with their counterparts overseas—were happy to let Americans foot the bill.

**President Trump promised** to change all that. And he has.

[Watch: NATO is getting back on track!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5979af7def&e=3ee4985eea)

**A hallmark** of the Trump Administration foreign policy is making sure America isn’t asked to be the world’s sole policeman. For NATO, that means strengthening the alliance by making clear that all members must meet their responsibilities under the agreement, which spells out that 2 percent of GDP be committed to investing in defense.

**Once President Trump** made his expectations clear, a funny thing happened: Today, nine members have met their targets, adding $130 billion to total defense budgets. Moreover, two-thirds of our NATO allies are on track to hit the 2 percent goal by 2024.

**There’s work left** to do, which is why President Trump is keeping the pressure on. The United States still accounts for nearly 70 percent of combined NATO defense spending. But under this Administration, we’ve seen the biggest improvement on that front in a generation.

**“We are making real progress,** most importantly on the burden sharing,” NATO Secretary General Jens Stoltenberg said in London today. “And your leadership on defense spending is having a real impact,” he told President Trump.

**“This is unprecedented.** This is making NATO stronger. And it shows that this Alliance is adapting, responding when the world is changing.”

**Here are some highlights** from President Trump’s busy first day at the summit:
* **🎬** President Trump and French President Emmanuel Macron discuss [NATO’s growing strength.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b60a7c119f&e=3ee4985eea)

* **🎬** Prime Minister Justin Trudeau of Canada weighs in on [what the USMCA trade deal will mean to workers.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f7f18c808a&e=3ee4985eea)

* **🎬** President Trump [calls out the horrific events in Iran](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a09751c35a&e=3ee4985eea)—and urges the media to do the same.

* **🎬** With the Trump Economy booming to historic levels, [China has everything to gain by completing a trade deal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7f2eccf927&e=3ee4985eea).

---
|
---
|

|
---

| **President Donald J. Trump meets with President Emmanuel Macron of France and Prime Minister Justin Trudeau of Canada in between meetings at Winfield House in London** | December 3, 2019
---
